text:
Market today: Sentiment is buoyed by positive Apple AI news and resilient retail sales, suggesting underlying economic strength. This is generally good for your tech and chip names, though geopolitical risks around oil supply remain a background concern.

Your holdings: SOXL (-41.46%) and SPAL (-37.89%) are deep in the red and leveraged; margin amplifies these drops. SMH (-9.56%) also needs attention with a 'TRIM' status.

Watch: Keep an eye on Apple's AI developments for potential ripple effects across the tech sector. Also, monitor small-cap momentum, as it could indicate broader market health.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions tightly and stay disciplined on stops as market sentiment remains sensitive.
plays: SPAL has breached its stop at 21.38. Consider exiting this leveraged position to limit further losses and manage margin.
SOXL is a 'SELL' and deeply underwater (-41.46%). Re-evaluate this leveraged position given its decay and significant drawdown.
Consider AAPL for a new buy at 327.88-326.91 with a stop at 325.23, supported by the Apple AI partnership news and scanner setup.
